summary: Made surgical seam edits to clarify the ten-day handoff from chapter 16 and to keep chapter 17's closing movement from colliding with chapter 18's day-shift/job-math opening. Also replaced one calibration-only dialogue line that appeared verbatim in Tammy's scene.
edits: Added a time marker to the opening: 'Ten days later.'
Changed Carmen's 'Come back tonight' line to 'Come back' so the ending does not over-fix the next shift cadence.
Rewrote the final car paragraph to end on exhaustion and procedural risk rather than repeating the economic math beat carried by chapter 18.
Replaced Tammy's bare 'Sure.' with 'Right.' to remove a calibration-only example line.
